---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a BuildrAI improvement
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: michaelversus
---

## Privacy Check

Before posting, redact private workflow details, repository names, prompts, screenshots, customer data, and team process information that should not be public.

## Product Area

- [ ] Session review
- [ ] Prompt quality or evaluation
- [ ] Token or workflow metrics
- [ ] Search or filtering
- [ ] Exports or share cards
- [ ] Source support
- [ ] Privacy or redaction
- [ ] Team workflow
- [ ] Other

## Problem Or Workflow Gap

What are you trying to do, and where does the current workflow fall short?

## Desired Outcome

What would you like BuildrAI to help you accomplish?

## Evidence Or Metric

What evidence, signal, metric, or report would make this workflow better?

## Alternatives Considered

Any workarounds, other tools, or alternate approaches you have tried.

## Additional Context

Any redacted screenshots, examples, or context that would help explain the request.
